question: Show the book title and purchase price of the book that has had the greatest amount in orders.
sql: SELECT Book.Title, Books_Order.amount AS purchase_price FROM Book JOIN Books_Order ON Book.ISBN = Books_Order.ISBN ORDER BY Books_Order.amount DESC LIMIT 1;

semantic.reason: 语义一致，原始问题要求显示购买价格最高的书的书名和购买价格，SQL反向翻译描述正确地指定了目标表、列、排序方式和限制条件。
